name: @quoin/tokens-radix
description: Radix Colors translated to Quoin. Slate neutral plus Blue accent (canonical Radix UI combination).

attribution.harvestNotes: Radix's 12-step alpha+saturation scale flattened to OKLCH greys for the neutral, plus the canonical Blue scale for the accent. Status colours from Radix's red, green, amber, blue scales (step 10 = solid).
